channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: 4 dead amid flooding caused by heavy rains, Kentucky governor says
item.description: Kentucky Gov. Andy Beshear says four people have died due to flooding from thunderstorms in that state.

item.title: 3 firefighters killed, 2 injured while tackling wildfires on the Colorado-Utah border
LGBTQ+ Pride parades set for Sunday in NYC and San Francisco
